text: Their going to publish the AcmeFlow Pro update, wich the team have wrote carefully. Product details remain at https://example.com/acmeflow.

# Installation

### Advanced setup

Run `deploy --target prod`.

Visit [the guide](https://example.com/guide).

STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE

1. Purpose
Control release approvals.

2. Scope
All production releases.

3. Responsibilities
The Release Manager approves releases.

4. Procedure
1. Developer submits Form QMS-17.
2. Release Manager asks: Approved?
3. If YES, deploy the release.

5. Records
Retain Form QMS-18 for three years.

Revision: R01
Owner: Quality Manager

The Graphic Design Manager approves artwork. The Graphic Design Manager records approval. The Graphic Design Manager archives the file. The Graphic Design Manager reports monthly. The Design Manager signs the final record.

FLOWCHART
Start -> Review request -> Complete?
YES -> Publish

WRITTEN PROCEDURE
1. Start review.
2. Check whether the request is complete.
3. If complete, publish it.
4. If incomplete, return it to the author.
5. End.
